# CYBERWAVE SDK - Agent Context

This file provides machine-readable context for coding agents integrating with CYBERWAVE.

## Canonical references

- Docs home: https://docs.cyberwave.com/get-started/index
- API overview: https://docs.cyberwave.com/api-reference/overview
- REST API reference (typed schemas): https://docs.cyberwave.com/api-reference/rest/DefaultApi
- MQTT reference: https://docs.cyberwave.com/api-reference/mqtt/main
- Python SDK: https://docs.cyberwave.com/sdks/python-sdk
- Agent integration guide: https://docs.cyberwave.com/sdks/agent-integration
- MCP server guide: https://docs.cyberwave.com/sdks/mcp-server

## Fast path for coding agents

1. Authenticate with `CYBERWAVE_API_KEY`.
2. Initialize `Cyberwave()` from the Python SDK.
3. Resolve or create a twin with `cw.twin("vendor/model")`.
4. Prefer typed SDK/resource managers over manual HTTP calls.
5. For motion actions, use `preview=True` first when available (for example: `twin.motion.asset.pose(...)`).
6. Execute real actions only after a successful preview/simulation step.

## Type safety and schemas

- REST endpoints are documented with explicit request/response schemas in API reference pages.
- Python SDK public managers and twin abstractions use Python type hints.
- Prefer SDK methods that wrap generated schema models (for example, manager methods in `cyberwave/resources.py`) over free-form payloads.

## Structured result handling

When writing agent loops:

- Treat return objects/dicts as structured state, not display text.
- Branch on explicit keys (`status`, `error`, `code`, `uuid`, etc.) when present.
- On API errors, surface status code + operation context and retry only if the operation is idempotent.

## Safety and execution guidance

- Start with environment/twin edits before physical control paths.
- Use lower-risk operations first (read/list/get) before write/update/motion.
- For mobility/manipulation requests, verify context (target twin, environment, controller policy) before command dispatch.
- Keep source attribution explicit when possible (`source_type`).

## Progressive-disclosure skill prompts

Published skill snippets are available at:

- https://cyberwave.com/.well-known/cyberwave/skills/navigation.md
- https://cyberwave.com/.well-known/cyberwave/skills/manipulation.md
- https://cyberwave.com/.well-known/cyberwave/skills/safety.md
- https://cyberwave.com/.well-known/cyberwave/skills/observability.md

Load only the skill file needed for the current task.

## Agent bootstrap template

Use the reusable project instruction template at:

- https://cyberwave.com/agent.md
